name: Arizer Glass Mini Whip with Glass Screen
summary: Arizer Glass Mini Whip with Glass Screen — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Arizer Glass Mini Whip, featuring an integrated glass screen and compatibility with Arizer XQ2 and Extreme Q vaporisers, is designed for use in both the balloon system and direct draws. This eliminates the need for metal screens, providing a smoother, cleaner vapour experience. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
